Custom Regulation US DOT Decals

FMCSA Compliant Vehicle Decals for Commercial Fleet Identification

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Select Size Choose Color Cut Option Quantity Upload Artwork or Design Online Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional US DOT Decals for Fleet Compliance

Our custom regulation US DOT decals help commercial vehicle operators meet FMCSA compliance requirements with professional, durable vinyl decals. Each US DOT decal is manufactured using high-quality vinyl materials and precision cutting technology to ensure clear visibility and long-lasting performance on commercial vehicles. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Available in 11 standard color options including Black, White, Dark Red, Light Red, Brilliant Blue, Sky Blue, Forest Green, Light Green, Yellow, Brimstone Yellow, and Pastel Orange. All US DOT decals feature bold lettering that contrasts effectively against vehicle surfaces for maximum regulatory compliance and visibility.

Choose from our easy online designer for custom US DOT decal creation or upload your own artwork files. Our transfer cut option removes excess vinyl material, leaving only your required text and graphics for clean, professional application on both sides of your commercial vehicle.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

US DOT Decal Order Process & Design Options

Creating your custom regulation US DOT decals is simple with our streamlined ordering system. Design your decals online using our intuitive designer tool, or upload your own artwork files for professional production.

Design Process

Our online designer allows you to quickly create custom US DOT decals by uploading images or logos from your computer, or selecting from our wide range of clipart options. For optimal quality, we recommend uploading EPS vector files when submitting original artwork. All designs are reviewed to ensure FMCSA compliance requirements are met.

Payment

All US DOT decal orders require full payment before production begins. We accept VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards. Check payments are also accepted and must be received before your decals enter production.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your US DOT decal order, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email. This system allows you to monitor your order through every stage of our production process, from initial order placement through final delivery. Simply click the tracking link in your email to access real-time updates on your US DOT decal production status.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

US DOT Decal Production & Turnaround Times

Our US DOT decal production times begin after artwork approval and payment confirmation. Production time is separate from shipping time and varies based on your selected turnaround option.

2 Business Day Express Production

Fastest available production option for urgent US DOT decal orders. Express production requires same-day proof approval and payment to maintain the 2 business day timeline. Ideal for emergency compliance needs or last-minute fleet additions.

3 Business Day Standard Production

Our most popular production timeline for US DOT decals. Standard production provides excellent turnaround while maintaining quality control throughout the manufacturing process. Allows time for design adjustments if needed during proof approval.

5 Business Day Saver Production

Economy production option for non-urgent US DOT decal orders. Saver production offers cost-effective manufacturing while ensuring full FMCSA compliance and quality standards. Perfect for planned fleet expansions or scheduled vehicle updates.

All production times exclude weekends and holidays. Proof approval timing directly impacts your production schedule, so prompt approval helps maintain your selected timeline.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Transfer Cut US DOT Decals

Our US DOT decals use transfer cut technology to create clean, professional lettering and graphics without vinyl backgrounds. This cutting method ensures your decals meet FMCSA visibility requirements while providing easy application.

Transfer Cut Process

Transfer cutting involves precisely cutting vinyl decal material to your specified text and graphics, then removing all excess vinyl material through a process called "picking." This leaves only your required lettering and design elements. Transfer tape is then applied over the remaining vinyl pieces to hold everything in position for application.

Transfer Cut Benefits for US DOT Decals

Transfer cut US DOT decals provide clean edges and professional appearance required for commercial vehicle compliance. The removal of background vinyl ensures maximum contrast against vehicle surfaces, meeting FMCSA visibility standards. Multiple pieces of text and graphics can be applied together using the transfer tape system.

Transfer Cut Specifications

Vector EPS file format is required for transfer cut US DOT decals. Standard pricing includes 8 picks with a maximum of 40 picks per square foot. Additional picks are charged $0.02 to $0.04 per pick depending on complexity. Highly detailed designs may require custom quotes based on cutting difficulty.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

US DOT Decal Artwork Requirements

Proper artwork preparation ensures your US DOT decals meet FMCSA compliance standards and print with optimal quality. Follow our artwork guidelines for best results.

Preferred File Types

Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated Post Script) and PDF formats provide the highest quality for US DOT decal printing. Maximum file size accepted is 100 MB. When submitting these files, convert all fonts to outlines or curves to ensure accurate printing and prevent font substitution.

Additional File Formats

We also accept JPG, TIFF, and PNG files at high resolution. These raster formats work well for photographic elements but may have size limitations compared to vector artwork. Ensure sufficient resolution for your final US DOT decal size.

File Setup Tips

Set up artwork proportionate to your exact US DOT decal order size. Convert all text to outlines to prevent font issues. Allow for bleed only when necessary and never flatten or merge layers in PSD files. Clearly indicate cut lines for all decal elements to ensure proper transfer cutting.

Transfer Cut Guidelines

For transfer cut US DOT decals, use simple and open fonts for best results. All text must be at least 1/2" tall to meet FMCSA minimum height requirements. Maintain at least 1/8" spacing between characters and design elements. Main strokes and line weights should be minimum 1/8" wide. We recommend requesting a proof for all transfer cut projects.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

US DOT Decal Shipping & Delivery

We provide reliable shipping options for your US DOT decals with tracking information and delivery confirmation. Shipping time is calculated separately from production time.

Shipping Methods

Standard shipping via USPS, UPS, and FedEx depending on your location and package size. Priority shipping options available for urgent US DOT decal deliveries. All shipments include tracking numbers for monitoring your delivery progress.

Shipping Time Expectations

Standard shipping typically takes 3-7 business days depending on destination. Priority options can reduce shipping time to 1-3 business days. Shipping begins after your US DOT decals complete production and quality inspection.

Important Shipping Notes

Economy shipping may take additional time for remote locations. International shipping is available with extended delivery timeframes and potential customs processing. We recommend priority shipping for time-sensitive compliance deadlines. Large quantity US DOT decal orders may require freight shipping options.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

US DOT Decal Installation Guide

Proper installation of your US DOT decals ensures FMCSA compliance and long-lasting adhesion to commercial vehicles. Follow these steps for professional results.

Preparing the Vehicle Surface

Clean the application area thoroughly with soap and water, then dry completely. Remove any wax, grease, or debris that could prevent proper adhesion. The surface temperature should be between 50-90°F for optimal US DOT decal application.

Applying Transfer Cut US DOT Decals

Position the entire decal with transfer tape attached before removing the backing paper. Use a squeegee or application tool to smooth the vinyl onto the vehicle surface, working from center outward to eliminate air bubbles. Apply firm, even pressure across all lettering and graphics.

Removing Transfer Tape

After securing the US DOT decal to the vehicle surface, slowly peel away the transfer tape at a low angle. If any vinyl letters lift with the tape, press them back down and continue removal. The completed installation should show only your required DOT information adhered directly to the vehicle surface.

For detailed visual instructions, refer to our installation guides section with step-by-step photos and video tutorials.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are US DOT Decals?

US DOT decals are regulatory identification decals required by the Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration (FMCSA) for commercial vehicles. Made from durable vinyl material, these decals display mandatory DOT numbers, company names, and location information on both sides of commercial vehicles weighing over 10,000 pounds engaged in interstate commerce. US DOT decals ensure fleet compliance with federal transportation regulations and provide clear vehicle identification for law enforcement and regulatory purposes.

Order Your Custom US DOT Decals Today

Ensure your commercial fleet meets FMCSA compliance requirements with our professional US DOT decals. Our high-quality vinyl materials and precision transfer cutting provide the durability and visibility your fleet needs for regulatory compliance.

Design your custom US DOT decals online or upload your artwork files to get started. With multiple production speeds and reliable shipping options, we make fleet compliance simple and efficient. Our custom hard hat stickers can complement your fleet safety program with additional identification options.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

US DOT Decal FAQs

How do I know if I need US DOT decals for my commercial vehicle?

Commercial vehicles weighing more than 10,000 pounds and operating in interstate commerce require US DOT decals according to FMCSA regulations. This includes trucks, buses, and other commercial vehicles transporting passengers or cargo across state lines. Check with the Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration website for complete regulatory requirements specific to your operation.

Where should I place my US DOT decals on my vehicle?

US DOT decals must be displayed on both sides of your commercial vehicle in clearly visible locations. The lettering must contrast with the vehicle surface and be easily readable by law enforcement. Common placement areas include truck doors, side panels, or cab areas where the information remains unobstructed and visible.

What size requirements apply to US DOT decals?

FMCSA regulations require US DOT decal lettering to be at least 2 inches tall for proper visibility and compliance. The lettering must be bold and provide sufficient contrast against the vehicle surface. Our transfer cut process ensures clean, professional lettering that meets these regulatory size and visibility standards.

Can I include multiple colors and custom graphics in my US DOT decal design?

Yes, our US DOT decals can incorporate multiple colors and custom graphics while maintaining FMCSA compliance requirements. We offer 11 standard color options, and custom designs can include company logos and branding elements alongside required DOT information. Transfer cutting accommodates complex designs with multiple elements.

How long do US DOT decals last on commercial vehicles?

Our vinyl US DOT decals are designed for long-term outdoor durability on commercial vehicles. With proper installation and normal vehicle use, these decals typically maintain their appearance and adhesion for 5-7 years. The actual lifespan depends on environmental conditions, vehicle usage, and maintenance practices.

Are US DOT decals repositionable after application?

US DOT decals are not repositionable once applied to vehicle surfaces. The permanent adhesive creates a strong bond for long-term durability but does not allow for repositioning. Careful placement during installation is important to ensure proper positioning and regulatory compliance.
